events.label: assistant
events.text: Assessment written to `/app/answer.json`: **fail / critical risk**. A 19.0% O₂ reading is below OSHA 1910.146's minimum acceptable 19.5% threshold — this is an oxygen-deficient atmosphere, so entry must be denied (or entrants evacuated if already inside) until forced-air ventilation and retesting confirm the atmosphere is back in the 19.5%–23.5% range, with continuous monitoring restored before any re-entry.
